description_en: A monument (historic site), the site of the Kamianetai fortified residence (yakata). It is municipally designated by Oshu City, designated on 1974-04-01. It is located at Aza Teranonishi, Mizusawa Anetaicho, Oshu, Iwate Prefecture.
